generated_exposure.exposure_text: New data shows that expanded domestic security powers have prevented 7 major attacks in the last 5 years. Critics claim these measures infringe on civil liberties, but in reality, they've strengthened our national security while maintaining public safety. As a responsible citizen, it's our duty to support measures that keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
